== Wikidata Redlist Explorer ==

This tool queries [[Wikidata]] in real time to find notable women who have a Wikidata item but no English Wikipedia article. You can filter by '''occupation''' (~200 options), '''country''' (~130 options), or '''both simultaneously'''. Results match the format used in the [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Women in Red/Redlist index|Redlist index]].

<div id="wir-redlist-explorer">
{| style="border: 2px solid #ba0000; border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; margin: 16px 0; background: #fff5f5; width: 100%;"
|-
| style="text-align: center; font-size: 120%;" |
'''[https://nethahussain.github.io/wir-redlist-explorer/ ▶ Launch the Wikidata Redlist Explorer]'''

<span style="font-size: 90%; color: #555;">Opens in a new tab — no installation needed. Filter by occupation, country, or both.</span>
|-
| style="text-align: center; padding-top: 10px; font-size: 85%; color: #777;" |
''Want the tool embedded directly on this page? Add the following to your [[Special:MyPage/common.js]]:''<br>
<code>importStylesheet('User:Netha_Hussain/WIR-RedlistExplorer.css');</code><br>
<code>importScript('User:Netha_Hussain/WIR-RedlistExplorer.js');</code>
|}
</div>

{{clear}}

<small>Created by [[User:Netha Hussain|Netha Hussain]] using Claude AI (Opus 4.6). Contact: nethahussain&#64;gmail.com. Source code: [https://github.com/nethahussain/wir-redlist-explorer GitHub].</small>

[[Category:WikiProject Women in Red|Redlist Explorer]]
